form.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but he does have good record over this track and distance. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but he does have good record over this track and distance. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was tightened for room entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 320m at this track beaten half a length (18.62) behind Silvertree Brad in a Grade 5 on April 10. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 320m at this track beaten half a length (18.62) behind Silvertree Brad in a Grade 5 on April 10. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and ran wide.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 320m at this track in a handy (18.33), beating Anyone But You. Will find this a bit tougher, others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 3.5 lengths over 320m at this track in a handy (18.33), beating Anyone But You. Will find this a bit tougher, others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped awkwardly entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (18.91) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3.5 lengths second. Has never missed the frame from three starts from the draw, including a win. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 4 length fourth (18.39) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when a 4 length fourth (18.39) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (18.64) over 318m at Dubbo. Has a decent strike-rate from the draw but will need the right run to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together several times in the run to the first turn.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 10 over 320m at this track in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Beautiful Magpie at Bulli last start over 340m (20.00). Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 4th over 320m at this track beaten 7 lengths (18.85) behind Missy's Girl in a Grade 5 on April 10. Has ability and can run well.

Came together entering the back straight.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Despicable Pedro beaten 6 lengths (18.16). Has ability and can run well.
